iterations.ai_content: There are 10,124 buildings in Narvik municipality that intersect snow-avalanche hazard areas. This count includes all buildings with representasjonspunkt intersecting the hazard areas. No further filtering was applied beyond municipality and spatial intersection.

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Narvik%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, representasjonspunkt AS geometry FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '1806';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [snoskredaktsomhetskart]
SELECT omrade AS geometry FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[17.1,68.1],[17.1,68.6],[18.2,68.6],[18.2,68.1],[17.1,68.1]]]]}'), 4326), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geometry"
-- right_geom: "geometry"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- aggregation_type: "count"
